picks.rationale: NTLA surged +67% YTD, +25% 1W on Phase 3 HAELO CRISPR data for lonvo-z in HAE, showing statistically robust attack-rate reductions and a clean safety profile, with a rolling BLA underway and a 1H 2027 launch target. News sentiment is positive at +0.317, and high short interest of 43.78% adds squeeze potential.

MRNA has exploded +108% YTD, +33% 1M, driven by restructuring into three commercial franchises and positive FDA briefing docs for mRNA flu vaccine mFlusiva ahead of the June 18 VRBPAC meeting, with a PDUFA on Aug 5, 2026; strong cancer vaccine data (KEYNOTE-942) further supports platform. News sentiment is negative (-0.338) but the web search reveals substantial positive catalyst flow.
drivers: positive FDA VRBPAC briefing for mFlusiva

picks.rationale: BEAM has +94% 1Y return, +23.7% YTD, +25.3% 1M, and a strong_buy analyst consensus (score 1.29) with positive news sentiment (+0.391). High short interest (32.31%) suggests further upside potential as base-editing platform catalysts emerge.

ILMN rallied +76% 1Y, +20.5% YTD, +14.4% 1M, supported by strong fundamentals (P/E 29.44) and a beta of 1.49. Despite slightly negative news sentiment (-0.162), the genomics leader is well-positioned with a buy analyst rating.

CRSP has bounced +9.9% 1M and +6.2% 1W, with a buy rating (score 1.96) and positive news sentiment (+0.291). High short interest (25.74%) adds squeeze potential as gene-editing sector momentum builds alongside NTLA's CRISPR success.
NTRA gained +18.9% 1M and +4.4% 1W, with a strong buy analyst score (1.52) and low short interest (2.6%). Recent collaboration with CytoDyn for ctDNA-guided mCRC trials adds catalyst visibility.

LLY is up +11.1% 1M, +46% 1Y, with a P/E of 38.98 (reasonable for growth), positive news sentiment (+0.26), buy rating, and a massive £741.8B market cap signaling stability; obesity franchise momentum remains a key driver.

BMRN is up +10.3% 1M, with a buy consensus (score 1.69) and positive news sentiment (+0.242). P/E of 39.41 is elevated but reflects rare-disease pricing power, and low beta (0.24) provides downside protection.

RXRX has +10.4% 1M momentum despite -24% YTD, with low beta (1.004) and 32.8% short interest that could fuel a squeeze if AI drug discovery platform catalysts emerge. No official analyst score but technical setup is interesting.
PACB rallied +21.7% 1M despite -23.9% YTD, with positive news sentiment (+0.115) and high beta (2.323). The genomics platform could benefit from sector tailwinds, though fundamentals are speculative.

previous_picks.rationale: YTD +57.98%, Phase 3 HAELO met all key secondary endpoints showing 89% reduction in attacks requiring on-demand treatment and 91% reduction in moderate/severe attacks. Rolling BLA initiated, potential FDA approval and U.S. launch H1 2027. News sentiment positive at 0.317.

YTD +79.52%, 1W +16.07%, 1D +6.56%. FDA staff review says data for mRNA flu shot 'may support effectiveness', positive AdComm readout June 18. Potential first mRNA seasonal flu shot, supported by Jefferies' $750M sales estimate. 17.82% short interest adds squeeze potential.
drivers: FDA review favorable for mRNA flu shot
Potential first mRNA flu vaccine approval
